title: Student Loans in Northern Ireland: 2024 to 2025
body: "Student Loans for Higher Education in Northern Ireland: Financial Year 2024-25  This publication provides statistics on loan outlays, repayments of loans and borrower activity for Northern Ireland domiciled students studying in Higher Education (HE) and European Union (EU) students studying in Northern Ireland.  The figures cover Income Contingent Loans (ICR), which were introduced in 1998/99, for financial years up to and including 2024-25. "
